title: The Reach of Seele Was IPEA controlled by Seele
display_title: The Reach of Seele Was IPEA controlled by Seele
wikitext:
[]: The Reach of Seele: Was IPEA controlled by Seele?             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:32 am [Split from here . - Monk] IPEA is the name of the organisation. "International Project Evangelion Agency". "Acheron" is just the area of Bethany Base the Third Angel was trying to escape from (after it escaped from storage in the Cocytus area of the base). The full extent of the IPEA's power and their motives is unknown, so we don't know how much they can be said to "manage Evas" and they are only known to have had a hand in producing Evangelion Mark.04, but it is not known if they built the other Mark units.

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:42 am Shinoyami65 wrote: IPEA is the name of the organisation. "International Project Evangelion Agency". "Acheron" is just the area of Bethany Base the Third Angel was trying to escape from (after it escaped from storage in the Cocytus area of the base).

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:52 am iihieiii wrote: I know that...but that base highly suggests that it was controled by SEELE or IPEA...also...how suspicious is base who host a Angel in bones, a Eva prototype (Eva-05) and the Nabuco Key thing??? This base really seems to be making Eva/Mark experiments...So...Isn't Mark.04 practically a Eva/Angel experiment itself?!?! (and has IPEA logo on it)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:53 am iihieiii wrote: What i don't understand is why SEELE... already taken control of NERV and Gendo....also with Kaworu powers...would create such thing ?? ( Isn't SEELE powered enough?! )

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Mon Jul 01, 2013 7:00 am Shinoyami65 wrote: The Key of Nebudchadnezzar? Well the base is highly suspicous, but the SEELE logo on the Third Angel's forehead suggests that the base was run by SEELE rather than the IPEA.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 05, 2013 9:15 am Shinoyami65 wrote: The Key of Nebudchadnezzar? Well the base is highly suspicous, but the SEELE logo on the Third Angel's forehead suggests that the base was run by SEELE rather than the IPEA.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 05, 2013 9:31 am iihieiii wrote: Isn't SEELE controling IPEA?

[]:             Quote Post by fleeting » Fri Jul 05, 2013 6:41 pm iihieiii wrote: Isn't SEELE controling IPEA?
